$comment: This file is generated via firehose. DO NOT edit by hand. Make any changes required using the firehose repo instead.
title: measurementSatnavSubframe

timeOfValidity.description: time_of_validity: Time at which the measurement is considered to be valid.

gnssMessageId.description: gnss_message_id: Message ID provided from the satnav receiver.

satelliteSystem.description: satellite_system: Describes the satellite system that generated the subframe.

freqSlotId.description: freq_slot_id: Frequency slot +7 (range from 0-13). Only used for GLONASS.

numBytes.description: num_bytes: Number of bytes of subframe data.

dataVector.description: data_vector: num_bytes sized array of raw subframe message collected by the sensor. The underlying type and shape of the data vector is given by satnav_msg_id.

integrity.description: integrity: Measurement integrity.  Includes the integrity method used and an integrity value (which is to be interpreted based upon the integrity method).  The intent of allowing num_integrity > 1 is to report multiple integrity values based on multiple integrity methods.
